prompt: New Chinese Style Graduation Portrait | 4 Individually Refined Photos. Please generate 4 different individually refined graduation portrait photos based on 1-3 clear personal photos. Theme: 'New Chinese Style [Degree Level] Academic Robe Graduation Portrait'. Parameters: [Degree Level]: Bachelor / Master / Doctor. [Major Category]: Literature / Science / Engineering / Agriculture / Medicine / Management / Art / Law / Education / Economics / History / Philosophy / Military Science. [Main Color Scheme]: Default Chinese academic gown system. [Prop Preference]: Bouquet, ancient scrolls, writing brush, round fan, wooden plaque. [Background Type]: A. Simple retro brown studio; B. Dreamy green/gold bokeh. [Temperament]: Sweet, cool, gentle, playful, scholarly, energetic. 1 | Output Format: 4 distinct photos, 3:4 ratio, focused on upper body/half body. 2 | Character Consistency: Preserve face shape, features, skin tone, and expression. All 4 must look like the same real person, avoiding AI-model or heavy internet-celebrity styles. 3 | Style: Graduation theme with recognizable cap and gown, enhanced with New Chinese Hanfu details, updos with real flowers, and ancient scrolls. 4 | Clothing: Must retain academic gown silhouette but enhance collars, cuffs, and lapels with Hanfu embroidery, frog buttons, and cloud-shoulder details. Use major colors only as accents. 5 | Hairstyle: Updo required (low buns, braids); hair must be tucked or pulled back, no loose long hair. 6 | Cap and Flowers: Standard square cap with tassels and prominent real floral decorations (Zanhua). 7 | Props: Main props are ancient scrolls with calligraphic text like 'I'm not studying anymore' (不讀了), 'Happy Graduation', etc. 8 | Makeup: Exquisite but natural New Chinese style, avoiding heavy studio makeup. 9 | Environment: Simple studio background, soft bright lighting, photography quality with film-like depth. 10 | Allocation: Photo 1: Frontal bust, smiling, holding scrolls. Photo 2: Profile view, quiet expression, looking at scrolls. Photo 3: Energetic, holding 'Not studying anymore' scroll across chest. Photo 4: Playful interaction with props. 11 | Uniformity: Consistent person, outfit, and photography style. 12 | Avoidance: No generic Hanfu, stage costumes, plastic flowers, cheap studio looks, text on clothes, or AI fake faces.
